category.name: Gifts, benefits and hospitality from UK sources

fields.name: Appg
fields.description: Whether the benefit was via an All Parliamentary Group (APPG)

fields.name: PaymentType
fields.description: Whether the benefit was monetary or in kind

fields.name: PaymentDescription
fields.value: Hospitality for two guests at BOXPARK, Croydon, to watch England vs Ghana (£80 per person)

fields.description: Date on which the benefit was received

fields.description: End date, if the benefit was received over time

fields.description: Whether Member is the sole beneficiary

fields.description: Address of the donor, if this can be publicly shared

fields.name: DonorOtherDetails
fields.description: Description of donor status, where this could not be covered by defined options
